texts.label: text
texts.orig: "A" document defining the general state of the art which is not considered to be of particular relevance
texts.text: "A" document defining the general state of the art which is not considered to be of particular relevance

texts.label: text

texts.text: E " earlier application or patent but published on or after the international filing date

texts.label: text
texts.orig: "L" document which may throw doubts on priority claim(s) orwhich is
texts.text: "L" document which may throw doubts on priority claim(s) or which is cited to establish the publication date of another citation or other special reason (as specified)

texts.label: text
texts.text: "O" document referring to an oral disclosure , use , exhibition or other means

texts.label: text
texts.text: "P"ocument published prior to the international filing date but later than the priority date claimed

texts.text: Name and mailing address of the ISA/

texts.label: text

texts.text: "T" later document published after the international filing date or priority

texts.label: text
texts.orig: "X" document of particular relevance; the claimed invention cannot be considered novel or cannot be considered to involve an inventive step when the document is taken alone
texts.text: "X" document of particular relevance; the claimed invention cannot be considered novel or cannot be considered to involve an inventive step when the document is taken alone

texts.label: text
texts.text: "Y" doocument of particular relevance; the claimed invention cannot be considered to involve an inventive step when the doocument is combined with one or more other such documents, such combination being obvious to a person skilled in the art

texts.label: text
